  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AimComponent
    The AimComponent class represents the aiming state of an entity, such as a player.
    AimHUD
    The AimHUD class represents a custom HUD (Heads-Up Display) for aiming in the HFF plugin.
    AimSystem
    The AimSystem class is an EntityTickingSystem responsible for managing the aiming mechanics of entities that have an AimComponent.
    AmmoData
    The AmmoData record represents the data associated with the type of ammunition.
    AmmoData.Builder
    The Builder class provides a fluent interface for constructing AmmoData objects.
    AmmoRegistry
    The AmmoRegistry class serves as a central registry for managing and retrieving ammunition data associated with specific item IDs.
    CheckCooldownInteraction
    The CheckCooldownInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for checking whether a firearm is currently on cooldown.
    ConfigManager
    The ConfigManager class is responsible for loading and managing configuration settings for the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.
    EmptyHUD
    The EmptyHUD class is a utility class designed to hide custom HUDs (Heads-Up Displays) by replacing them with an empty HUD.
    FirearmAttachment
     
    FirearmClass
    The FirearmClass enum represents the historical classification of firearms based on their technological era and mechanism.
    FirearmRegistry
    The FirearmRegistry class serves ass a central registry for managing and retrieving firearm statistics associated with specific itemIds.
    FirearmState
    The FirearmState class is used to track the operational state of a firearm, such as the number of loaded projectiles.
    FirearmStateManager
    The FirearmStateManager class serves as a central manager for tracking and managing the state of firearms in the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.
    FirearmStateStorage
    The FirearmStateStorage class is responsible for saving and loading the state of firearms to and from a file.
    FirearmStats
    The FirearmStats record represents the statistics and properties of a firearm.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    The Builder class provides a fluent interface for constructing FirearmStats objects.
    FirearmType
    The FirearmType enum categorizes firearms into distinct types based on their design, function, and role.
    FirearmUuidInitializer
    The FirearmUuidInitializer class is responsible for initializing and managing UUIDs for firearms in a player's inventory.
    FireMode
    The FireMode enum defines the different firing modes available for firearms.
    HFF
    The HFF class is the main plugin class for the Hytale Firearm Framework (HFF) plugin.
    HFFAssetPackGenerator
    The HFFAssetPackGenerator class is responsible for generating asset packs for the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.
    OnCheckTimeout
     
    OnShoot
     
    ReloadingComponent
    The ReloadingComponent class is a component that represents the reloading state of a firearm.
    ReloadInteraction
    The ReloadInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for handling the reload mechanism of firearms in the game.
    ReloadSystem
    The ReloadSystem class is an EntityTickingSystem responsible for monitoring and managing the reloading process of a firearm in real-time.
    ShootFirearmInteraction
    The ShootFirearmInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for handling the shooting mechanism of firearms in the game.
    ShowFirearmRegistryCommand
    The ShowFirearmRegistryCommand class is an asynchronous command that displays a list of all registered firearms in the game.
    ShowProjectilesCommand
    The ShowProjectilesCommand class is an asynchronous command that displays a list of all registered projectiles in the game.
    ShowUUIDCommand
    The ShowUUIDCommand class is a player command that displays the UUID of the currently held weapon.
    ToggleAimInteraction
    The ToggleAimInteraction class is a SimpleInstantInteraction responsible for toggling the aiming mode of a player's firearm.
